matches.match_rationale: Multi-step workflow: ingest disbursement records, apply scheme-specific posting rules, sequence postings, flag variances.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agent that ingests batch disbursement files from each scheme, maps each credit to the correct account type, and produces a variance report.

matches.match_rationale: Orphaned credits, over/under-postings, and mismatched amounts can be flagged intra-month rather than at month-end.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A model scoring each new posting transaction for anomaly likelihood and surfacing suspected mis-postings in near real-time.

matches.match_rationale: Each scheme delivers disbursement data in its own format that must be normalized to a canonical schema.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A transformation layer normalizing raw disbursement exports into a unified posting record schema.

matches.match_rationale: Finance staff need reconciliation memos and campus-level variance summaries after automated runs.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Automated generation of month-end reconciliation memos and variance summaries from structured reconciliation output.
